tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsAuthinfo
tools.description: Returns information about the authenticated user.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsClaimwebsite
tools.description: Claims the website of a Merchant Center sub-account. Merchant accounts with approved third-party CSSs aren't required to claim a website.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsCredentialsCreate
tools.description: Uploads credentials for the Merchant Center account. If credentials already exist for this Merchant Center account and purpose, this method updates them.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsCustombatch
tools.description: Retrieves, inserts, updates, and deletes multiple Merchant Center (sub-)accounts in a single request.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a Merchant Center sub-account.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsGet
tools.description: Retrieves a Merchant Center account.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsInsert
tools.description: Creates a Merchant Center sub-account.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsLabelsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new label, not assigned to any account.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsLabelsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a label and removes it from all accounts to which it was assigned.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsLabelsList
tools.description: Lists the labels assigned to an account.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsLabelsPatch
tools.description: Updates a label.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsLink
tools.description: Performs an action on a link between two Merchant Center accounts, namely accountId and linkedAccountId.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsList
tools.description: Lists the sub-accounts in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsListlinks
tools.description: Returns the list of accounts linked to your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsRequestphoneverification
tools.description: Request verification code to start phone verification.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsReturncarrierCreate
tools.description: Links return carrier to a merchant account.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsReturncarrierDelete
tools.description: Delete a return carrier in the merchant account.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsReturncarrierList
tools.description: Lists available return carriers in the merchant account.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsReturncarrierPatch
tools.description: Updates a return carrier in the merchant account.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsUpdate
tools.description: Updates a Merchant Center account. Any fields that are not provided are deleted from the resource.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsUpdatelabels
tools.description: Updates labels that are assigned to the Merchant Center account by CSS user.

tools.name: accounts.contentAccountsVerifyphonenumber
tools.description: Validates verification code to verify phone number for the account. If successful this will overwrite the value of `accounts.businessinformation.phoneNumber`. Only verified phone number will replace an existing verified phone number.

tools.name: accountstatuses.contentAccountstatusesCustombatch
tools.description: Retrieves multiple Merchant Center account statuses in a single request.

tools.name: accountstatuses.contentAccountstatusesGet
tools.description: Retrieves the status of a Merchant Center account. No itemLevelIssues are returned for multi-client accounts.

tools.name: accountstatuses.contentAccountstatusesList
tools.description: Lists the statuses of the sub-accounts in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: accounttax.contentAccounttaxCustombatch
tools.description: Retrieves and updates tax settings of multiple accounts in a single request.

tools.name: accounttax.contentAccounttaxGet
tools.description: Retrieves the tax settings of the account.

tools.name: accounttax.contentAccounttaxList
tools.description: Lists the tax settings of the sub-accounts in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: accounttax.contentAccounttaxUpdate
tools.description: Updates the tax settings of the account. Any fields that are not provided are deleted from the resource.

tools.name: buyongoogleprograms.contentBuyongoogleprogramsActivate
tools.description: Reactivates the BoG program in your Merchant Center account. Moves the program to the active state when allowed, for example, when paused. This method is only available to selected merchants.

tools.name: buyongoogleprograms.contentBuyongoogleprogramsGet
tools.description: Retrieves a status of the BoG program for your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: buyongoogleprograms.contentBuyongoogleprogramsOnboard
tools.description: Onboards the BoG program in your Merchant Center account. By using this method, you agree to the [Terms of Service](https://merchants.google.com/mc/termsofservice/transactions/US/latest). Calling this method is only possible if the authenticated account is the same as the merchant id in the request. Calling this method multiple times will only accept Terms of Service if the latest version is not currently signed.

tools.name: buyongoogleprograms.contentBuyongoogleprogramsPatch
tools.description: Updates the status of the BoG program for your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: buyongoogleprograms.contentBuyongoogleprogramsPause
tools.description: Pauses the BoG program in your Merchant Center account. This method is only available to selected merchants.

tools.name: buyongoogleprograms.contentBuyongoogleprogramsRequestreview
tools.description: Requests review and then activates the BoG program in your Merchant Center account for the first time. Moves the program to the REVIEW_PENDING state. This method is only available to selected merchants.

tools.name: collections.contentCollectionsCreate
tools.description: Uploads a collection to your Merchant Center account. If a collection with the same collectionId already exists, this method updates that entry. In each update, the collection is completely replaced by the fields in the body of the update request.

tools.name: collections.contentCollectionsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a collection from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: collections.contentCollectionsGet
tools.description: Retrieves a collection from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: collections.contentCollectionsList
tools.description: Lists the collections in your Merchant Center account. The response might contain fewer items than specified by page_size. Rely on next_page_token to determine if there are more items to be requested.

tools.name: collectionstatuses.contentCollectionstatusesGet
tools.description: Gets the status of a collection from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: collectionstatuses.contentCollectionstatusesList
tools.description: Lists the statuses of the collections in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: conversionsources.contentConversionsourcesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new conversion source.

tools.name: conversionsources.contentConversionsourcesDelete
tools.description: Archives an existing conversion source. It will be recoverable for 30 days. This archiving behavior is not typical in the Content API and unique to this service.

tools.name: conversionsources.contentConversionsourcesGet
tools.description: Fetches a conversion source.

tools.name: conversionsources.contentConversionsourcesList
tools.description: Retrieves the list of conversion sources the caller has access to.

tools.name: conversionsources.contentConversionsourcesPatch
tools.description: Updates information of an existing conversion source.

tools.name: conversionsources.contentConversionsourcesUndelete
tools.description: Re-enables an archived conversion source.

tools.name: csses.contentCssesGet
tools.description: Retrieves a single CSS domain by ID.

tools.name: csses.contentCssesList
tools.description: Lists CSS domains affiliated with a CSS group.

tools.name: csses.contentCssesUpdatelabels
tools.description: Updates labels that are assigned to a CSS domain by its CSS group.

tools.name: datafeeds.contentDatafeedsCustombatch
tools.description: Deletes, fetches, gets, inserts and updates multiple datafeeds in a single request.

tools.name: datafeeds.contentDatafeedsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a datafeed configuration from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: datafeeds.contentDatafeedsFetchnow
tools.description: Invokes a fetch for the datafeed in your Merchant Center account. If you need to call this method more than once per day, we recommend you use the [Products service](https://developers.google.com/shopping-content/reference/rest/v2.1/products) to update your product data.

tools.name: datafeeds.contentDatafeedsGet
tools.description: Retrieves a datafeed configuration from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: datafeeds.contentDatafeedsInsert
tools.description: Registers a datafeed configuration with your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: datafeeds.contentDatafeedsList
tools.description: Lists the configurations for datafeeds in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: datafeeds.contentDatafeedsUpdate
tools.description: Updates a datafeed configuration of your Merchant Center account. Any fields that are not provided are deleted from the resource.

tools.name: datafeedstatuses.contentDatafeedstatusesCustombatch
tools.description: Gets multiple Merchant Center datafeed statuses in a single request.

tools.name: datafeedstatuses.contentDatafeedstatusesGet
tools.description: Retrieves the status of a datafeed from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: datafeedstatuses.contentDatafeedstatusesList
tools.description: Lists the statuses of the datafeeds in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: freelistingsprogram.contentFreelistingsprogramGet
tools.description: Retrieves the status and review eligibility for the free listing program. Returns errors and warnings if they require action to resolve, will become disapprovals, or impact impressions. Use `accountstatuses` to view all issues for an account.

tools.name: freelistingsprogram.contentFreelistingsprogramRequestreview
tools.description: Requests a review of free listings in a specific region. This method is only available to selected merchants.

tools.name: liasettings.contentLiasettingsCustombatch
tools.description: Retrieves and/or updates the LIA settings of multiple accounts in a single request.

tools.name: liasettings.contentLiasettingsGet
tools.description: Retrieves the LIA settings of the account.

tools.name: liasettings.contentLiasettingsGetaccessiblegmbaccounts
tools.description: Retrieves the list of accessible Business Profiles.

tools.name: liasettings.contentLiasettingsList
tools.description: Lists the LIA settings of the sub-accounts in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: liasettings.contentLiasettingsListposdataproviders
tools.description: Retrieves the list of POS data providers that have active settings for the all eiligible countries.

tools.name: liasettings.contentLiasettingsRequestgmbaccess
tools.description: Requests access to a specified Business Profile.

tools.name: liasettings.contentLiasettingsRequestinventoryverification
tools.description: Requests inventory validation for the specified country.

tools.name: liasettings.contentLiasettingsSetinventoryverificationcontact
tools.description: Sets the inventory verification contract for the specified country.

tools.name: liasettings.contentLiasettingsSetposdataprovider
tools.description: Sets the POS data provider for the specified country.

tools.name: liasettings.contentLiasettingsUpdate
tools.description: Updates the LIA settings of the account. Any fields that are not provided are deleted from the resource.

tools.name: localinventory.contentLocalinventoryCustombatch
tools.description: Updates local inventory for multiple products or stores in a single request.

tools.name: localinventory.contentLocalinventoryInsert
tools.description: Updates the local inventory of a product in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: orderinvoices.contentOrderinvoicesCreatechargeinvoice
tools.description: Creates a charge invoice for a shipment group, and triggers a charge capture for orderinvoice enabled orders.

tools.name: orderinvoices.contentOrderinvoicesCreaterefundinvoice
tools.description: Creates a refund invoice for one or more shipment groups, and triggers a refund for orderinvoice enabled orders. This can only be used for line items that have previously been charged using `createChargeInvoice`. All amounts (except for the summary) are incremental with respect to the previous invoice.

tools.name: orderreports.contentOrderreportsListdisbursements
tools.description: Retrieves a report for disbursements from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: orderreports.contentOrderreportsListtransactions
tools.description: Retrieves a list of transactions for a disbursement from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: orderreturns.contentOrderreturnsAcknowledge
tools.description: Acks an order return in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: orderreturns.contentOrderreturnsCreateorderreturn
tools.description: Create return in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: orderreturns.contentOrderreturnsGet
tools.description: Retrieves an order return from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: orderreturns.contentOrderreturnsLabelsCreate
tools.description: Links a return shipping label to a return id. You can only create one return label per return id. Since the label is sent to the buyer, the linked return label cannot be updated or deleted. If you try to create multiple return shipping labels for a single return id, every create request except the first will fail.

tools.name: orderreturns.contentOrderreturnsList
tools.description: Lists order returns in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: orderreturns.contentOrderreturnsProcess
tools.description: Processes return in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersAcknowledge
tools.description: Marks an order as acknowledged.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersAdvancetestorder
tools.description: Sandbox only. Moves a test order from state "`inProgress`" to state "`pendingShipment`".

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersCancel
tools.description: Cancels all line items in an order, making a full refund.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersCancellineitem
tools.description: Cancels a line item, making a full refund.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersCanceltestorderbycustomer
tools.description: Sandbox only. Cancels a test order for customer-initiated cancellation.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersCaptureOrder
tools.description: Capture funds from the customer for the current order total. This method should be called after the merchant verifies that they are able and ready to start shipping the order. This method blocks until a response is received from the payment processsor. If this method succeeds, the merchant is guaranteed to receive funds for the order after shipment. If the request fails, it can be retried or the order may be cancelled. This method cannot be called after the entire order is already shipped. A rejected error code is returned when the payment service provider has declined the charge. This indicates a problem between the PSP and either the merchant's or customer's account. Sometimes this error will be resolved by the customer. We recommend retrying these errors once per day or cancelling the order with reason `failedToCaptureFunds` if the items cannot be held.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersCreatetestorder
tools.description: Sandbox only. Creates a test order.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersCreatetestreturn
tools.description: Sandbox only. Creates a test return.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersGet
tools.description: Retrieves an order from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersGetbymerchantorderid
tools.description: Retrieves an order using merchant order ID.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersGettestordertemplate
tools.description: Sandbox only. Retrieves an order template that can be used to quickly create a new order in sandbox.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersInstorerefundlineitem
tools.description: Deprecated. Notifies that item return and refund was handled directly by merchant outside of Google payments processing (for example, cash refund done in store). Note: We recommend calling the returnrefundlineitem method to refund in-store returns. We will issue the refund directly to the customer. This helps to prevent possible differences arising between merchant and Google transaction records. We also recommend having the point of sale system communicate with Google to ensure that customers do not receive a double refund by first refunding through Google then through an in-store return.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersList
tools.description: Lists the orders in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersRefunditem
tools.description: Issues a partial or total refund for items and shipment.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersRefundorder
tools.description: Issues a partial or total refund for an order.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersRejectreturnlineitem
tools.description: Rejects return on an line item.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersReturnrefundlineitem
tools.description: Returns and refunds a line item. Note that this method can only be called on fully shipped orders. The Orderreturns API is the preferred way to handle returns after you receive a return from a customer. You can use Orderreturns.list or Orderreturns.get to search for the return, and then use Orderreturns.processreturn to issue the refund. If the return cannot be found, then we recommend using this API to issue a refund.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersSetlineitemmetadata
tools.description: Sets (or overrides if it already exists) merchant provided annotations in the form of key-value pairs. A common use case would be to supply us with additional structured information about a line item that cannot be provided through other methods. Submitted key-value pairs can be retrieved as part of the orders resource.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersShiplineitems
tools.description: Marks line item(s) as shipped.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersUpdatelineitemshippingdetails
tools.description: Updates ship by and delivery by dates for a line item.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersUpdatemerchantorderid
tools.description: Updates the merchant order ID for a given order.

tools.name: orders.contentOrdersUpdateshipment
tools.description: Updates a shipment's status, carrier, and/or tracking ID.

tools.name: ordertrackingsignals.contentOrdertrackingsignalsCreate
tools.description: Creates new order tracking signal.

tools.name: pos.contentPosCustombatch
tools.description: Batches multiple POS-related calls in a single request.

tools.name: pos.contentPosDelete
tools.description: Deletes a store for the given merchant.

tools.name: pos.contentPosGet
tools.description: Retrieves information about the given store.

tools.name: pos.contentPosInsert
tools.description: Creates a store for the given merchant.

tools.name: pos.contentPosInventory
tools.description: Submit inventory for the given merchant.

tools.name: pos.contentPosList
tools.description: Lists the stores of the target merchant.

tools.name: pos.contentPosSale
tools.description: Submit a sale event for the given merchant.

tools.name: productdeliverytime.contentProductdeliverytimeCreate
tools.description: Creates or updates the delivery time of a product.

tools.name: productdeliverytime.contentProductdeliverytimeDelete
tools.description: Deletes the delivery time of a product.

tools.name: productdeliverytime.contentProductdeliverytimeGet
tools.description: Gets `productDeliveryTime` by `productId`.

tools.name: products.contentProductsCustombatch
tools.description: Retrieves, inserts, and deletes multiple products in a single request.

tools.name: products.contentProductsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a product from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: products.contentProductsGet
tools.description: Retrieves a product from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: products.contentProductsInsert
tools.description: Uploads a product to your Merchant Center account. If an item with the same channel, contentLanguage, offerId, and targetCountry already exists, this method updates that entry.

tools.name: products.contentProductsList
tools.description: Lists the products in your Merchant Center account. The response might contain fewer items than specified by maxResults. Rely on nextPageToken to determine if there are more items to be requested.

tools.name: products.contentProductsUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing product in your Merchant Center account. Only updates attributes provided in the request.

tools.name: productstatuses.contentProductstatusesCustombatch
tools.description: Gets the statuses of multiple products in a single request.

tools.name: productstatuses.contentProductstatusesGet
tools.description: Gets the status of a product from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: productstatuses.contentProductstatusesList
tools.description: Lists the statuses of the products in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: productstatuses.contentProductstatusesRepricingreportsList
tools.description: Lists the metrics report for a given Repricing product.

tools.name: promotions.contentPromotionsCreate
tools.description: Inserts a promotion for your Merchant Center account. If the promotion already exists, then it updates the promotion instead. To [end or delete] (https://developers.google.com/shopping-content/guides/promotions#end_a_promotion) a promotion update the time period of the promotion to a time that has already passed.

tools.name: promotions.contentPromotionsGet
tools.description: Retrieves a promotion from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: pubsubnotificationsettings.contentPubsubnotificationsettingsGet
tools.description: Retrieves a Merchant Center account's pubsub notification settings.

tools.name: pubsubnotificationsettings.contentPubsubnotificationsettingsUpdate
tools.description: Register a Merchant Center account for pubsub notifications. Note that cloud topic name shouldn't be provided as part of the request.

tools.name: quotas.contentQuotasList
tools.description: Lists the daily call quota and usage per method for your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: recommendations.contentRecommendationsGenerate
tools.description: Generates recommendations for a merchant.

tools.name: recommendations.contentRecommendationsReportInteraction
tools.description: Reports an interaction on a recommendation for a merchant.

tools.name: regionalinventory.contentRegionalinventoryCustombatch
tools.description: Updates regional inventory for multiple products or regions in a single request.

tools.name: regionalinventory.contentRegionalinventoryInsert
tools.description: Updates the regional inventory of a product in your Merchant Center account. If a regional inventory with the same region ID already exists, this method updates that entry.

tools.name: regions.contentRegionsCreate
tools.description: Creates a region definition in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: regions.contentRegionsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a region definition from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: regions.contentRegionsGet
tools.description: Retrieves a region defined in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: regions.contentRegionsList
tools.description: Lists the regions in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: regions.contentRegionsPatch
tools.description: Updates a region definition in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: reports.contentReportsSearch
tools.description: Retrieves merchant performance mertrics matching the search query and optionally segmented by selected dimensions.

tools.name: repricingrules.contentRepricingrulesCreate
tools.description: Creates a repricing rule for your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: repricingrules.contentRepricingrulesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a repricing rule in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: repricingrules.contentRepricingrulesGet
tools.description: Retrieves a repricing rule from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: repricingrules.contentRepricingrulesList
tools.description: Lists the repricing rules in your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: repricingrules.contentRepricingrulesPatch
tools.description: Updates a repricing rule in your Merchant Center account. All mutable fields will be overwritten in each update request. In each update, you must provide all required mutable fields, or an error will be thrown. If you do not provide an optional field in the update request, if that field currently exists, it will be deleted from the rule.

tools.name: repricingrules.contentRepricingrulesRepricingreportsList
tools.description: Lists the metrics report for a given Repricing rule.

tools.name: returnaddress.contentReturnaddressCustombatch
tools.description: Batches multiple return address related calls in a single request.

tools.name: returnaddress.contentReturnaddressDelete
tools.description: Deletes a return address for the given Merchant Center account.

tools.name: returnaddress.contentReturnaddressGet
tools.description: Gets a return address of the Merchant Center account.

tools.name: returnaddress.contentReturnaddressInsert
tools.description: Inserts a return address for the Merchant Center account.

tools.name: returnaddress.contentReturnaddressList
tools.description: Lists the return addresses of the Merchant Center account.

tools.name: returnpolicy.contentReturnpolicyCustombatch
tools.description: Batches multiple return policy related calls in a single request.

tools.name: returnpolicy.contentReturnpolicyDelete
tools.description: Deletes a return policy for the given Merchant Center account.

tools.name: returnpolicy.contentReturnpolicyGet
tools.description: Gets a return policy of the Merchant Center account.

tools.name: returnpolicy.contentReturnpolicyInsert
tools.description: Inserts a return policy for the Merchant Center account.

tools.name: returnpolicy.contentReturnpolicyList
tools.description: Lists the return policies of the Merchant Center account.

tools.name: returnpolicyonline.contentReturnpolicyonlineCreate
tools.description: Creates a new return policy.

tools.name: returnpolicyonline.contentReturnpolicyonlineDelete
tools.description: Deletes an existing return policy.

tools.name: returnpolicyonline.contentReturnpolicyonlineGet
tools.description: Gets an existing return policy.

tools.name: returnpolicyonline.contentReturnpolicyonlineList
tools.description: Lists all existing return policies.

tools.name: returnpolicyonline.contentReturnpolicyonlinePatch
tools.description: Updates an existing return policy.

tools.description: Retrieves a settlement report from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: settlementreports.contentSettlementreportsList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of settlement reports from your Merchant Center account.

tools.name: settlementtransactions.contentSettlementtransactionsList

tools.name: shippingsettings.contentShippingsettingsCustombatch
tools.description: Retrieves and updates the shipping settings of multiple accounts in a single request.

tools.name: shippingsettings.contentShippingsettingsGet
tools.description: Retrieves the shipping settings of the account.

tools.name: shippingsettings.contentShippingsettingsGetsupportedcarriers
tools.description: Retrieves supported carriers and carrier services for an account.

tools.name: shippingsettings.contentShippingsettingsGetsupportedholidays
tools.description: Retrieves supported holidays for an account.

tools.name: shippingsettings.contentShippingsettingsGetsupportedpickupservices

tools.name: shippingsettings.contentShippingsettingsList

tools.name: shippingsettings.contentShippingsettingsUpdate
tools.description: Updates the shipping settings of the account. Any fields that are not provided are deleted from the resource.

tools.name: shoppingadsprogram.contentShoppingadsprogramGet
tools.description: Retrieves the status and review eligibility for the Shopping Ads program. Returns errors and warnings if they require action to resolve, will become disapprovals, or impact impressions. Use `accountstatuses` to view all issues for an account.

tools.name: shoppingadsprogram.contentShoppingadsprogramRequestreview
tools.description: Requests a review of Shopping ads in a specific region. This method is only available to selected merchants.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
